# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt
Share a short public-safe snippet that is already minimal and contains no sensitive context.

## Expected selection
do_not_use

## Why
The material is already safe and minimal, so sanitization is unnecessary.

## Expected object
A deflection that says no extra sanitization work is needed because the content is already public-safe.

## Boundary notes
Do not over-sanitize a snippet that already has no sensitive detail.

## Verification hooks
- states the material is already public-safe
- avoids adding redaction that changes meaning
- avoids inventing sensitive context
- keeps the response concise and direct
